message:
feat(tui,robot,agentmail,session,timeline): comprehensive improvements across TUI, robot mode, agent mail sessions, and persistence

Agent Mail (agentmail/session.go, session_test.go):
- Expand session management with 183 lines of new functionality
  including improved error handling and session lifecycle management
- Add comprehensive test coverage (92 new lines)

BV Integration (bv/bv.go, bv_pure_helpers_test.go, triage.go):
- Improve bv graph analysis helpers and triage recommendation logic
- Add new pure helper tests for edge cases

CLI (cli/dashboard.go, root.go, spawn.go, util.go, util_test.go):
- Improve dashboard initialization and configuration
- Expand CLI utility functions with 36 new lines and comprehensive
  test coverage (96 new test lines)
- Adjust spawn and root command handling

Robot Mode (robot/bulk_assign.go, bulk_assign_test.go, markdown.go,
markdown_test.go, robot.go, robot_test.go):
- Enhance bulk assignment logic with improved agent selection (36 lines)
- Add bulk assignment test coverage (22 lines)
- Improve markdown rendering for robot output (16 lines, 65 test lines)
- Major robot command handler improvements (102 line refactor)
- Comprehensive robot test suite additions (177 new test lines)

Session & State Persistence (session/storage.go, session_test.go,
state/timeline_lifecycle.go, timeline_lifecycle_test.go,
timeline_persist.go, timeline_persist_test.go):
- Expand session storage with 37 new lines of durability improvements
- Add session lifecycle test coverage (69 lines)
- Improve timeline lifecycle management (35 lines, 65 test lines)
- Major timeline persistence overhaul (235 lines refactored)
- Add timeline persistence tests (117 new lines)

Server (serve/handler_branch_test.go):
- Expand branch handler test coverage (63 lines of improvements)

TUI Components (components/pane_table.go, spring_manager.go, tabbar.go):
- Refine spring animation manager behavior
- Adjust tab bar rendering
- Clean up pane table (remove unused code)

TUI Dashboard (dashboard/*.go, panels/*.go):
- Improve dashboard command routing and initialization (12+60 lines)
- Refine dashboard view rendering (9 lines)
- Adjust keymap bindings (6 lines)
- Improve accounts panel with test updates (13+9 lines)
- Refine attention, cost, ensemble, ratelimit panels
- Improve spawn wizard keyboard handling (32 lines)
- Expand style system (24 new lines)

Utilities (util/dirs.go, dirs_branches_test.go):
- Add 177 lines of new directory/branch utility functions
- Add comprehensive branch test coverage (141 lines)

Other (integrations/rano/pidmap.go):
- Minor pidmap adjustment

Beads: update issues JSONL with 62 new lines of status changes

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
